item.title: Logistics giant DP World replaces chairman named in Jeffrey Epstein documents
item.description: Dubai has named a new chairman for DP World, one of the world’s largest logistics companies, replacing a chairman named in the Jeffrey Epstein files

item.title: 4 Smart Moves to Cut Your 2025 Tax Bill Under New Rules
item.description: How to maximize your savings and avoid phaseouts under temporary changes in Trump’s budget bill

item.title: Trump boasts of over $1.5B in political funds, which could rock the midterms
item.description: President Donald Trump says he's amassed a collection of campaign funds exceeding $1.5 billion, an unprecedented sum for a lame-duck president

item.title: Goldman Sachs' top lawyer Kathy Ruemmler to resign after emails show close ties to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Goldman Sachs’ top lawyer Kathy Ruemmler is resigning after emails revealed she had a close relationship with Jeffrey Epstein

item.title: Asia shares lower after sharp Wall Street losses on AI-related worries
item.description: Asian markets are lower after a tech sell-off on Wall Street over investor concerns about AI disruptions
